程序包的使用
bupt.ta.model

  • 使用bupt.ta.model的程序包 
    程序包 说明
    bupt.ta.ai  
    bupt.ta.llm  
    bupt.ta.model  
    bupt.ta.service  
    bupt.ta.storage  
    bupt.ta.util  
  • bupt.ta.ai使用的bupt.ta.model中的类 
    类和说明
    Application
    Job application - TA applies for a job.
    Job
    Job posting - created by Module Organiser.
    TAProfile
    TA applicant profile - skills, availability, etc.
  • bupt.ta.llm使用的bupt.ta.model中的类 
    类和说明
    AiApiSettings
    Admin-managed LLM (DeepSeek-compatible) API settings.
    Job
    Job posting - created by Module Organiser.
    TAProfile
    TA applicant profile - skills, availability, etc.
  • bupt.ta.model使用的bupt.ta.model中的类 
    类和说明
    WorkArrangementItem
    One row of work arrangement on an MO job posting.
  • bupt.ta.service使用的bupt.ta.model中的类 
    类和说明
    AdminSettings
    Admin-managed recruitment rules.
    Application
    Job application - TA applies for a job.
    InterviewSlot
    A bookable interview slot for one job posting.
    Job
    Job posting - created by Module Organiser.
    SiteNotification
    In-app notification (site message) for a user — persisted as JSON.
    TAProfile
    TA applicant profile - skills, availability, etc.
    User
    User entity - represents TA, MO (Module Organiser), or Admin.
  • bupt.ta.storage使用的bupt.ta.model中的类 
    类和说明
    AdminSettings
    Admin-managed recruitment rules.
    AiApiSettings
    Admin-managed LLM (DeepSeek-compatible) API settings.
    Application
    Job application - TA applies for a job.
    ApplicationEvent
    Immutable-style timeline event for one application.
    AssignedModule
    One module that an admin assigns to an MO for the current term.
    EmailOtpRecord
    Persisted email OTP record (for verification codes).
    InterviewEvaluation
    MO interview assessment for one application.
    InterviewSlot
    A bookable interview slot for one job posting.
    Job
    Job posting - created by Module Organiser.
    SiteNotification
    In-app notification (site message) for a user — persisted as JSON.
    TAProfile
    TA applicant profile - skills, availability, etc.
    User
    User entity - represents TA, MO (Module Organiser), or Admin.
  • bupt.ta.util使用的bupt.ta.model中的类 
    类和说明
    Application
    Job application - TA applies for a job.
    Job
    Job posting - created by Module Organiser.
    WorkArrangementItem
    One row of work arrangement on an MO job posting.
